name: Escalloped Pineapple
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the sugar and butter.
2. Add the eggs, milk, bread cubes, and pineapple chunks with juice to the creamed mixture. Toss everything together until well combined.
3. Pour the mixture into a large oblong baking pan or two small square pans.
4. Bake for one hour at 350°F.
5. Serve with ham or as a dessert. This recipe serves 4 to 6 people.
